headings.usage: Use tight letter spacing (tracking-tight). Never use Inter for headings.

body.usage: Use relaxed line height (leading-relaxed) for readability.

primary.description: Deep Forest Green - represents trust, stability, and calm.

accent.description: Terracotta - adds warmth, human connection, and urgency without being aggressive.

spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Generous Spacing Philosophy: use p-8, p-12, p-16 for breathing room. Prioritize negative space to reduce cognitive load and induce calm.
spacing_and_layout.containers: Containers with borders must have internal padding (p-6 or p-8) to avoid text collision.
spacing_and_layout.grids: Use 'Bento' Grid Protocol for marketing (grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-12, gap-8 to gap-12). For dashboard features, use dense 'Control Room' grid but softened with radii.
spacing_and_layout.alignment: Paragraphs and dense content must be left-aligned. Center align only for hero headings if it improves visual rhythm.

components.buttons: Rounded-full (pill shape) for primary CTAs to feel approachable. Soft shadows. Never transparent background on main CTAs.
components.cards: Subtle border (1px border-stone-200), flat background, rounded-2xl. On hover: slight lift (-translate-y-1) and soft ambient shadow (shadow-lg).
components.forms: Use Shadcn components heavily customized. Soft borders, focus ring in Accent color (Terracotta) with focus:ring-2.
components.navigation: Crystal glass effect (backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/70) for sticky header, with a 1px border-b border-stone-200/50. Minimalist links.

motion_and_interactions.hover: Hover states must explicitly set text color (e.g. hover:bg-stone-100 hover:text-stone-900).
motion_and_interactions.accessibility: Respect prefers-reduced-motion. Ensure focus states have higher contrast. Add aria-hidden='true' to purely decorative elements.

icons_and_assets.style: Soft, rounded, stroke-width 1.5. Emphasize organic lines over sharp technical icons.

images.description: Warm, smiling family couple reflecting emotional connection.
images.usage: Hero section. Use with a gradient overlay (bg-gradient-to-r from-white/80 via-white/40 to-transparent) if text is placed on top. Never use a solid blanket overlay.

images.description: Elderly couple looking at a smartphone together on a sofa.
images.usage: Use for the 'Why parents feel supported' or Multilingual messaging section. Soft rounded corners (rounded-2xl).

images.description: Adult child at home smiling at a screen.
images.usage: Use for the onboarding workflow or 'How it works' section. Focus on the feeling of relief.

testing_attributes.rule: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute.

context_specific_strategies.landing_page: High visual impact, storytelling, trust-building. Use generous negative space and multi-generational imagery. Action-oriented CTAs (e.g., 'Stay Close from Afar'). Tone: Empathetic, not clinical.
context_specific_strategies.onboarding: Lead with feeling, not feature. Add a '3-second grounding moment' (visual pause) before asking sensitive relationship data. Use checklists over long tours. Focus on fast first success (completing the first care schedule).
context_specific_strategies.dashboard: Information clarity, functional beauty. Soft UI, dense but with generous cell padding. Clear typography for scheduling messages. Use cardless, rectangular, dense styles with subtle roundness (max 8px border-radius in dashboard).

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly adhere to the color palette. DO NOT use generic Vercel/Stripe default colors.
Always apply 'data-testid' to interactive elements for robust automated testing.
Use pure HTML+Tailwind for the landing page layouts (avoid Shadcn Card/Section components here to allow creative layouts); heavily customize Shadcn for dashboard and onboarding forms.
Install and use 'Outfit' (headings) and 'Manrope' (body) fonts via Google Fonts in index.html or global css.
The emotional tone must be 'Trust, care, dignity, privacy'. Avoid sterile, 'tech-bro', or clinical medical visuals.
For the WhatsApp integration UI, use the standard WhatsApp Green (#25D366) only as a localized accent in that specific feature area, not as the primary app color.
